name: Deploy Mínimo

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main  # Se ejecuta cada vez que subes algo a la rama main

jobs:
  copy-readme:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: ⬇️ Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: 📤 Copiar README al VPS
        uses: appleboy/scp-action@v0.1.7
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.SSH_HOST_ASTER }}
          username: ${{ secrets.SSH_USER_ASTER }}
          key: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          source: "README.md"
          target: "/opt/workspaces/prova"
          # strip_components: 0 asegura que no cree carpetas extra
          strip_components: 0
